decks.notes: This deck utilizes Mystic Forge and various untap effects to generate infinite mana and card advantage, allowing for powerful combos and overwhelming board presence. The key strategy revolves around quickly assembling the combo pieces, such as Manifold Key and Grim Monolith, to generate enough resources to overwhelm the opponent with massive plays and game-winning threats. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern to disrupt the opponent's strategy and ensure that the combo can be successfully executed.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures, then using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back into play for a game-winning combo. It includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo pieces, while also having versatile threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to efficiently reanimate high-impact creatures while controlling the game with counter magic and disruptive spells.

The deck revolves around using Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor to mill cards from the library, triggering abilities like Thassa's Oracle to win the game instantly. The deck also uses cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares for protection and disruption, along with Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student for card advantage. The inclusion of Narcomoeba and Dread Return allows for additional combo potential. Urza's Saga is used to help find key combo pieces, while cards like Brainstorm and Ponder provide card selection. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and efficiently to win the game.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through interaction with cards like Thoughtseize, Smallpox, and Witherbloom Command. It also utilizes the graveyard as a resource with cards like Life from the Loam and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis. The deck aims to control the board with creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Barrowgoyf, while also generating value with Urza's Saga and Eumidian Hatchery. Additionally, it has strong land destruction capabilities with cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter. The deck seeks to grind out the opponent and overwhelm them with its versatile control strategy.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Mystic Forge combo by using artifacts to generate mana and control the board. The key cards enable the player to manipulate their library, generate extra mana, and disrupt opponents' strategies. By utilizing powerful artifacts and synergistic pieces, the deck seeks to establish a dominant board presence and overwhelm opponents with a combination of card advantage and powerful threats. The focus is on efficiently assembling the combo pieces and executing a game-winning sequence that can quickly close out the match.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing Mystic Forge to effectively cast spells from the top of the library without paying their mana cost. The deck includes key cards such as Voltaic Key and Mishra's Research Desk to generate additional mana and manipulate the top of the library. By utilizing the artifacts and planeswalkers in the deck, players can quickly build an overwhelming board state and overwhelm their opponent with powerful spells and abilities.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Entomb and Brainstorm, then reanimating them for a fast win condition. It includes a mix of control elements such as Force of Will and Daze to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also utilizes powerful threats like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to apply pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient graveyard recursion and powerful creature threats.

Utilize powerful card draw, disruption, and fast mana to quickly fill the graveyard with high impact creatures, then cheat them into play with reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. Use counter magic like Force of Will and Daze to protect your key combo pieces and disrupt your opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides additional card advantage and can help filter your draws. The key goal is to assemble a quick and efficient reanimation combo to overwhelm your opponent with powerful threats and win the game before they can establish their own game plan.

This deck aims to quickly ramp up mana with Cloudposts and other lands, allowing the player to cast powerful spells and threats such as Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. It also includes a control aspect with cards like Force of Will and Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck relies on generating a significant amount of mana to overwhelm the opponent with powerful spells and creatures, creating a strong board presence and securing victory.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mixture of black, blue, and green cards that aim to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up a strong board presence. It includes a variety of removal spells, hand disruption tools, and powerful creatures like Tarmogoyf and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will while also applying pressure with efficient threats like Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis and Baleful Strix. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's multicolor requirements and includes utility lands like Wasteland and Misty Rainforest.

This deck focuses on using a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to control the opponent's board while applying constant pressure. It utilizes powerful equipment like Kaldra Compleat and Swords to Plowshares to quickly close out games. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion adds additional value by allowing for extra card advantage and flexibility. With a mix of creatures like Stoneforge Mystic and Skyclave Apparition, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while steadily building its own board presence for a decisive victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of ramp, disruption, and efficient creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Natural Order, the deck can quickly bring out powerful threats such as Wight of the Reliquary and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. Thoughtseize is used to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Elvish Reclaimer and Sylvan Safekeeper provide versatility and protection. The deck also utilizes a toolbox approach with cards like Collector Ouphe and Keen-Eyed Curator to deal with various threats. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy while providing flexibility with cards like Gaea's Cradle and the fetch lands.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill your opponent's entire deck in one turn. By using cards like Goblin Engineer, Goblin Welder, and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker, you can easily tutor for the pieces you need and set up the combo quickly. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive cards like Pyroblast and Pithing Needle to protect your combo and control the game. With aggressive mana acceleration from cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide, you can quickly set up your combo and overwhelm your opponent.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand using cards like Entomb and Faithless Looting, then bring them back onto the battlefield with spells such as Reanimate and Animate Dead. This allows the player to cheat out massive threats early in the game, overpowering the opponent and securing a quick victory through a powerful reanimation combo. The deck focuses on speed and efficiency to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to mount a defense.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures through cards like Entomb and Thoughtseize, then using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield. Key creatures like Murktide Regent and Archon of Cruelty provide strong threats, supported by disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze for protection. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student acts as card advantage and selection, while Atraxa, Grand Unifier offers utility and versatility. The mana base is designed to support the rapid casting of spells while also disrupting opponents with cards like Wasteland.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan by utilizing powerful tempo plays and efficient threats. By combining cheap disruptive spells like Daze and Force of Will with efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Delver of Secrets, the deck aims to apply pressure while keeping the opponent on the back foot. Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm help dig for key cards while Lightning Bolt and Brazen Borrower provide additional removal and reach. Wasteland and disruption spells further enhance the deck's ability to disrupt the opponent's mana base and strategy.

The key concept of this deck is to assemble the Cephalid Breakfast combo, which involves using Cephalid Illusionist's ability to mill the library, and then using either Dread Return or Thassa's Oracle to win the game. The deck includes support cards like Nomads en-Kor and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to help set up the combo, as well as protection cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares. Urza's Saga is included to help find key pieces of the combo, making the deck a fast and efficient combo deck in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on a disruptive and aggressive strategy by utilizing creatures with powerful enter-the-battlefield abilities to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a strong equipment package to further enhance its creatures and apply pressure on the opponent. Additionally, it features a companion to provide additional value and flexibility throughout the game. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the deck's color requirements and maximize consistency. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure, disrupt the opponent's plays, and maintain control of the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Doomsday combo to win the game through a combination of cards that allow for quick and efficient deck manipulation, card draw, and protection. Key cards such as Street Wraith, Thassa's Oracle, and Lotus Petal are crucial in setting up the combo while Brainstorm, Dark Ritual, and Personal Tutor allow for the necessary resources to be acquired. Force of Will and other counterspells provide protection against opposing disruption, while the land base is optimized for consistency and sequencing. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the needed pieces for a game-winning Doomsday combo.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures like Broadside Bombardiers and Pyrogoyf, combined with disruptive cards like Magus of the Moon and Chalice of the Void, to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With the help of ramp cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Chrome Mox, the deck aims to lock down the opponent's mana base with cards like Blood Moon and Magus of the Moon, while also dealing direct damage with cards like Lavaspur Boots and Sundering Eruption. Overall, the deck focuses on creating a fast and disruptive game plan to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping out powerful artifacts and dragons to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. It utilizes cards like City of Traitors and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Trinisphere and Chalice of the Void. Karn, the Great Creator acts as a versatile threat, and cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Broadside Bombardiers provide additional sources of damage. The goal is to establish a dominant board presence early on and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. The key strategy revolves around controlling the board through removal like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize, while deploying threats like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and utility while cards like Daze and Force of Will offer protection against opposing spells. The mana base is built to support a variety of spells and to disrupt the opponent's resources with Wasteland. The deck's synergy and versatile card choices make it a formidable opponent in Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards such as Noble Hierarch and Gaea's Cradle, while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Collector Ouphe and Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes powerful creatures like Endurance and Wight of the Reliquary to establish board presence and apply pressure. The inclusion of cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Once Upon a Time allows for flexibility in searching for answers or threats as needed. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Mystic Forge to quickly assemble powerful combos and effectively control the game. With a high density of artifact cards, including mana-producing artifacts and powerful threats like Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to generate massive advantage by casting multiple spells each turn and disrupting the opponent's game plan. The combination of artifact synergy, efficient card draw, and strong finishers make this deck a formidable force in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on utilizing Nadu, Winged Wisdom to generate card advantage and control the game through its unique abilities. It combines protection spells like Swords to Plowshares and Force of Will with card draw and manipulation tools like Brainstorm and Ponder to find combo pieces efficiently. The deck includes a toolbox of creatures like Nomads en-Kor and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath to further support the combo strategy. Additionally, it runs disruptive cards like Teferi, Time Raveler to disrupt opponents' game plans. The mana base is carefully crafted to ensure consistent access to all colors needed for the deck's spells.

The key strategy of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Birds of Paradise and Noble Hierarch, search for combo pieces like Nadu, Winged Wisdom and Nomads en-Kor using Chord of Calling and Green Sun's Zenith, and then use these pieces to generate infinite mana and card draw. Once the combo is assembled, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. The inclusion of cards like Collector Ouphe and Endurance helps to disrupt opposing strategies, while cards like Sylvan Safekeeper provide protection for key pieces.

This deck aims to quickly put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play by casting Show and Tell and using cards like Sneak Attack and Omniscience. Atraxa, Grand Unifier helps to support the combo by buffing creatures and providing additional utility. Cards like Brainstorm, Force of Will, and Veil of Summer ensure protection and consistency, while Stock Up provides card advantage. The mana base allows for quick and efficient casting of spells, with fetch lands and dual lands ensuring access to all necessary colors.

This deck aims to quickly cheat out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. The deck also includes protection like Force of Will and Veil of Summer to ensure the combo goes off smoothly. It also includes cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Stock Up to generate value and dig for combo pieces. The mana base is optimized for speed and consistency, allowing the player to overwhelm opponents with big threats early in the game.

This deck focuses on efficiently putting big threats into play from the graveyard using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck also utilizes powerful interaction spells like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps dig for combo pieces while Murktide Regent and other threats provide alternate win conditions. The mana base is designed to support the deck's powerful spells while also providing some disruption with cards like Wasteland. Overall, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats from the graveyard.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, then using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield ahead of schedule. This combo strategy aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures early in the game, while also disrupting their plans with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze. The key to success lies in efficiently setting up the graveyard and executing the reanimation combos before the opponent can mount a defense.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures through cards like Entomb and Reanimate, then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a low cost. It also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Archon of Cruelty, while controlling the game with cards like Brazen Borrower and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck aims to execute its game plan efficiently and effectively, aiming to win the game in just a few turns.

This deck aims to quickly deploy threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan with efficient countermagic and removal spells. By leveraging powerful Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler alongside disruptive spells like Daze and Force of Will, the deck can apply pressure while protecting its own threats. The inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Ponder help ensure consistent draws, while Wasteland and Lightning Bolt provide additional disruption. The overall strategy is to maintain tempo and pressure the opponent into making suboptimal plays, ultimately leading to victory through aggressive means.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Cloudpost and other lands to cast powerful spells like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. The deck also includes disruption spells like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor to control the game until the combo can be fully deployed. Stock Up is included to draw more cards and Chalice of the Void is used to control the opponent's spells. The One Ring provides additional power and protection for the deck's creatures.

The deck focuses on efficiently generating and using mana to cast multiple spells in one turn, with the goal of creating a large storm count to finish the game with Tendrils of Agony. It includes a variety of cards that help generate mana, disrupt the opponent, and search for key combo pieces. The deck utilizes artifacts and powerful storm spells to generate mana quickly and efficiently, while also using Wishclaw Talisman and Burning Wish to tutor for needed cards. The deck aims to win quickly and decisively through a high storm count and lethal Tendrils of Agony.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling the Cephalid Breakfast combo using Cephalid Illusionist, Nomads en-Kor, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to mill cards from the library and create a loop with Narcomoeba. The combo goal is to eventually cast either Thassa's Oracle or Dread Return to win the game. The deck includes various control elements like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Daze to protect the combo pieces. Urza's Saga provides additional utility and searching power. The mana base includes fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistency in casting spells.

The deck focuses on combining Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor to mill the library and bring out Narcomoeba and Thassa's Oracle for a win condition. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to filter through the deck for key pieces while also providing protection with Force of Will. Urza's Saga is utilized to tutor for crucial artifacts like Shuko. The deck also includes disruption with counterspells like Force of Will and removal options like Swords to Plowshares. Memory's Journey and Dread Return provide graveyard recursion for added consistency in executing the combo.

The central theme of this Dragon Stompy deck is to disrupt opponents with cards like Magus of the Moon, Chalice of the Void, and Blood Moon, while also ramping up mana quickly with cards like Chrome Mox and Simian Spirit Guide. The deck aims to play aggressively with creatures like Broadside Bombardiers and Pyrogoyf, and can finish off opponents with cards like Sundering Eruption and Shatterskull Smashing. The overall strategy is to lock down the opponent's mana base and overwhelm them with powerful threats to secure victory.

The main concept of this Dragon Stompy deck is to disrupt opponents' mana bases with cards like Blood Moon, Magus of the Moon, and Chalice of the Void, while also ramping up quickly with fast mana sources like Chrome Mox and Simian Spirit Guide. This allows the deck to play powerful threats like Sundering Eruption and Pyrogoyf ahead of curve and overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. The deck aims to control the board and pressure opponents with its creatures, while also having answers to key threats with cards like Fury and Lavaspur Boots.

The main concept of this Dragon Stompy deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's mana base by playing cards like Magus of the Moon, Chalice of the Void, and Blood Moon. By locking the opponent out of playing their spells efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm them with aggressive creatures like Broadside Bombardiers and Pyrogoyfs. The deck also includes cards like Fury and Sundering Eruption for additional removal and reach. With the help of fast mana acceleration from cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Chrome Mox, this deck aims to establish early board control and finish the game quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing Aether Vial and creatures with enter-the-battlefield effects to control the board while putting pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes disruption spells like Force of Will and Prismatic Ending to deal with threats. Additionally, the inclusion of Yorion as a companion allows for additional value by flickering creatures and other permanents. The mana base is designed to support the diverse color requirements of the deck, with lands like Karakas and Wasteland providing additional utility. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents with its strategic plays and synergy.

The main focus of this Grixis Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and hand disruption. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Orcish Bowmasters, Baleful Strix, and Kolaghan's Command while also maintaining card advantage through cards like Snapcaster Mage and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Narset, Parter of Veils and Lórien Revealed to further control the game and generate value. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to outlast the opponent and control the game until victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of lands and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Mox Diamond, Crop Rotation, and Life from the Loam, the deck aims to ramp up and secure its land base while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Pithing Needle. The key win condition of the deck revolves around assembling the Dark Depths/Thespian's Stage combo to create a 20/20 Indestructible Marit Lage token. This deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent through careful land management and strategic play.

This combo deck aims to generate infinite mana using Mystic Forge, Grim Monolith, and Manifold Key. The key cards are used to untap artifacts and generate mana, allowing the player to cast a high number of spells in a single turn. With cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to support the combo, the deck can easily overwhelm opponents with a large number of threats and quickly close out the game. The deck is designed to be proactive and efficient, aiming to win the game as quickly as possible.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Mystic Forge to assemble powerful artifact combos and generate card advantage. It features a mix of mana acceleration, disruption, and tutor cards to support the main strategy. The goal is to efficiently cast artifacts with the Forge's ability, while also utilizing cards like Voltaic Key and Manifold Key to untap permanents for additional value. The deck aims to quickly establish a dominant board presence through a combination of mana ramp, artifact synergy, and disruptive elements.

This deck focuses on using Mystic Forge to power out powerful artifacts and combo pieces. With cards like Manifold Key and Urza's Saga to manipulate the board, along with powerful artifacts like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to generate value and overwhelm the opponent with its artifact synergies. The deck also utilizes cards like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's strategy while advancing its own game plan. Overall, the deck is designed to create a powerful board state and win through overwhelming artifact synergies.

The deck focuses on using artifacts and mana acceleration to quickly assemble Mystic Forge and generate infinite mana with cards like Grim Monolith and Voltaic Key, allowing the player to cast spells from the top of their library. Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator provide additional utility and control, while cards like Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern help disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck aims to create a powerful board state and win the game through overwhelming card advantage and efficient combos.

The deck focuses on using Mystic Forge to assemble a powerful combo utilizing artifacts like Basalt Monolith, Manifold Key, and Grim Monolith to generate mana and play powerful cards like Ugin, Karn, and Tezzeret. The goal is to quickly ramp up mana production using artifact synergy and use Mystic Forge's ability to cast cards from the top of the library to assemble a winning board state. The deck aims to control the game through card advantage and powerful spellcasting with a focus on artifacts.

This deck focuses on utilizing Mystic Forge alongside various artifacts and cards that can help generate mana and control the board. By carefully managing resources and using cards like Urza's Tower and Workshop, players can assemble powerful combinations that can lead to a quick victory. The deck also utilizes Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain to further enhance the synergy between artifacts and combinations. The goal is to create a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up for a game-winning combo.

This deck focuses on utilizing Mystic Forge to combo with artifacts like Grim Monolith and Urza's Saga to generate mana and card advantage. By controlling the board with cards like Portable Hole and Pithing Needle, the deck aims to assemble a powerful engine that can overwhelm the opponent quickly. With support from cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, the deck is able to create a strong lock on the game and secure victory through a combination of card advantage and board presence.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the combo potential of Nadu, Winged Wisdom with Nomads en-Kor to generate infinite mana and draw the entire deck. Delighted Halfling serves as a win condition by dealing damage equal to the number of cards in the player's library. The deck includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares for protection and control, while also featuring ramp options like Green Sun's Zenith and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath for flexibility and sustainability. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful finish.

The deck focuses on using creature combos and tutoring spells to quickly assemble a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with large creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. It utilizes cards like Birds of Paradise and Noble Hierarch to ramp up mana and green fetch lands to thin out the deck. Nadu, Winged Wisdom is a key piece in the combo, allowing for card draw and protection. The deck also includes disruption cards like Collector Ouphe and Endurance to disrupt the opponent's strategy while executing its own game plan.

This deck focuses on using Nadu, Winged Wisdom to generate card advantage and create an infinite combo with Nomads en-Kor. It includes protection spells like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to control the game while setting up the combo. The deck also includes ramp cards like Noble Hierarch and Green Sun's Zenith to accelerate its game plan. Teferi, Time Raveler is included to provide additional disruption and Boseiju, Who Endures can be used to protect key spells from countermagic. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Nadu, Winged Wisdom alongside Nomads en-Kor to draw through the entire library and win the game. The deck includes cards that support this combo like Birds of Paradise and Chord of Calling, as well as protection with cards like Endurance and Sylvan Safekeeper. The deck aims to use mana acceleration from cards like Gaea's Cradle and Noble Hierarch to quickly set up the combo and overwhelm the opponent with a massive board state.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 Combo - Painter deck focuses on creating a powerful synergy between Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Painter's Servant to manipulate the color of all permanents and set up game-winning combos with Grindstone. The deck also features disruption with counterspells like Force of Will and Metallic Rebuke, as well as card draw engine with Thoughtcast. Urza's Saga provides additional artifact tutors, while Ancient Tomb accelerates mana production. Ultimately, the key concept revolves around assembling the combo pieces efficiently while disrupting opponents' game plans.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures through spells like Entomb and Reanimate. By utilizing powerful reanimation spells and disruption like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, the deck aims to cheat out big threats like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier ahead of schedule. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and filtering, while Orcish Bowmasters helps deal with opposing creatures. With a mix of control elements and powerful threats, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with high-impact plays while disrupting their game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Entomb and Reanimate, then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a powerful early game advantage. The combination of card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and efficient threats like Murktide Regent creates a versatile and powerful strategy that can overwhelm opponents quickly. Additionally, the mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's various color requirements.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Archon of Cruelty using spells like Entomb and Reanimate. It aims to cheat these creatures into play early and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. The deck is designed to be able to protect its game plan with counter spells like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The land base is optimized to provide the right colors of mana needed for the deck's spells while also being able to disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier by utilizing cards like Entomb, Reanimate, and Animate Dead. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo pieces and control the opponent's resources. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and filtering, while Murktide Regent serves as a powerful threat. The deck aims to win by assembling the reanimation combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to cheat big creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play from the graveyard. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to protect its combo pieces. Additionally, the deck includes card selection and manipulation tools like Brainstorm and Ponder to find the key combo pieces quickly. The mana base is tuned to support the deck's color requirements while also being able to disrupt the opponent with cards like Wasteland.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Entomb and Thoughtseize, and then bringing them back onto the battlefield using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck also includes key disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze to protect the combo pieces. With a mix of creatures that provide utility and threats like Murktide Regent and Archon of Cruelty, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures early in the game. This deck focuses on using cheap and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Daze to control the board while deploying threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to pressure the opponent. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain a tempo advantage, using cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble to filter through the deck efficiently. With a mix of counter spells and removal, the deck aims to quickly close out games by overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively play threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Delver of Secrets, and Murktide Regent while disrupting the opponent with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze. The deck aims to maintain tempo advantage through efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat while leveraging card advantage engines such as Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm. The deck focuses on controlling the board by using efficient creatures and counterspells, while also capitalizing on fast damage output with burn spells. By disrupting opponents with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, and utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm for card advantage and selection, the deck aims to maintain a strong tempo advantage.
